name: Persimmon Cookies2
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon soda, dissolved in the persimmon pulp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
3. Gradually add the raisins, nuts, and persimmon pulp (with dissolved soda) to the batter.
4. Stir in the dry ingredients (flour and spice mixture) until just combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a lined cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for approximately 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown and firm.
